name: Chorus.ai Conversation Intelligence API
what_it_does: Chorus.ai (ZoomInfo) REST API for sales conversation intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to access call recordings, transcripts, and AI-analyzed conversation data including talk ratios, next steps, competitor mentions, and deal risk signals. Chorus focuses on revenue team coaching and deal intelligence from customer-facing conversations.
use_cases: Retrieving sales call transcripts and AI insights from revenue intelligence agents
Analyzing conversation metrics and talk ratios from sales coaching agents
Extracting next steps and competitor mentions from deal intelligence agents
Integrating Chorus call data into CRM opportunity management agents
not_for: Unauthorized call recording without participant consent
best_when: A sales or revenue ops team using Chorus.ai wants AI agents to analyze call quality, extract deal signals, and integrate conversation intelligence into CRM workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Sales call recordings contain customer PII and confidential business conversations. CONSENT: Call recording laws vary by jurisdiction — multi-party consent may be required. Chorus is now part of ZoomInfo.

auth.notes: Chorus.ai API access via API key or OAuth. Enterprise access required. Contact ZoomInfo/Chorus for API partner access. Documentation not publicly available.

pricing.paid_tiers: Chorus pricing is enterprise negotiated through ZoomInfo
pricing.notes: Chorus is now part of ZoomInfo. Pricing negotiated as part of ZoomInfo enterprise contracts. API access requires Chorus enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer call recordings and transcripts contain highly sensitive PII
CONSENT: Multi-party consent laws for call recording vary by state and country
No public MCP server — enterprise API access only
Chorus is now part of ZoomInfo — API may change as product integrates
Public API documentation not available — enterprise customers get private docs
Consider Gong.io API for more mature conversation intelligence API alternative
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer call recordings and sales conversation data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API. Recording consent requirements. ZoomInfo acquisition may affect roadmap.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer call recordings. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API. Recording consent laws vary by jurisdiction.
